overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial district with massive cooling towers and elevated highways. The scene transitions from a steam-filled industrial area with graffiti-covered towers to a covered street beneath elevated highways lined with digital billboards, finally emerging into an open area with palm trees and satellite dishes during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cooling tower complex with elevated highway

agents.ego_description: following a character walking through an industrial area with massive cooling towers emitting steam

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path through the industrial cooling tower complex

entered.detail: Massive concrete cooling towers covered in colorful graffiti emitting white steam
Elevated highway structure with red warning lights spanning across the scene
Tall futuristic industrial skyscrapers visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial area dominated by massive graffiti-covered cooling towers emitting steam. The camera follows a character walking forward on a dirt path toward the towers, with an elevated highway structure visible to the left and futuristic industrial buildings rising in the background during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath elevated highway with digital advertising

black car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway following the character ahead along the asphalt street

notable_agents.action: walking ahead under the overpass away from the cooling towers
black sedan driving past on the left side of the covered street

entered.detail: Underside of the massive elevated highway structure creating a roof over the street
Large illuminated advertising screens mounted on the left wall showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the elevated highway into a covered street section. The cooling towers disappear behind as the scene becomes dominated by the concrete underside of the overpass and bright digital billboards lining the left wall. A black car passes by on the left as the character continues walking forward through the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street continuing under the elevated highway system

events.description: slight turn to the right as the street curves following the highway structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered street with billboards on the left, approaching a curved section

notable_agents.action: walking ahead approaching the curved ramp section of the overpass

entered.detail: Curved ramp structure of the highway ahead creating a tunnel-like effect

segments.scene_description: The journey continues under the elevated highway with consistent coverage from the concrete overpass above. Digital billboards remain visible on the left. The street begins to curve slightly to the right as it approaches a large curved ramp structure, with a blue vehicle briefly visible on the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone under curved highway ramp with bright advertisements

events.description: enters the shadow of the curved overpass ramp with dramatic golden hour lighting creating high contrast
passes under the curved ramp and begins to exit the covered highway area into open space

agents.ego_description: walking under the curved overpass structure with bright advertisements illuminating the walls on the left

notable_agents.action: walking through the underpass toward the open area with satellite dishes visible ahead

entered.detail: Massive curved concrete ramp of the highway passing overhead creating a tunnel effect
Large satellite dish arrays becoming visible on buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under a dramatic curved ramp structure where the lighting shifts to high contrast with golden hour sun streaming in. Large digital billboards showing muscular figures illuminate the left wall. Satellite dishes become visible on the right as the camera approaches the exit from the covered highway area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial street with palm trees and satellite communication arrays

events.description: exits the covered highway area into an open street with palm trees and clear sky visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk with industrial buildings on the right and a concrete channel on the left

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the distant city buildings along the open street

entered.detail: Tall palm trees lining the street ahead silhouetted against the sky
Single-story industrial buildings with satellite dishes mounted on the roof
Concrete drainage channel or ramp running parallel to the street on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the highway into a wide open area bathed in golden hour light. Palm trees line the distant street, and large satellite dishes are mounted on low industrial buildings to the right. The concrete channel runs along the left side as the character continues walking toward the distant cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a steam-filled industrial zone into a sheltered urban corridor that eventually opens into a sun-drenched plaza. It begins on a dirt path leading toward massive, graffiti-covered cooling towers emitting steam under a golden hour sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts beneath the concrete underside of an elevated highway, where the open vista is replaced by a sheltered street lined with bright digital billboards and passing vehicles. The camera then follows a slight curve under a dramatic ramp structure, where high-contrast sunlight begins to stream in and illuminate satellite dishes on the right. Finally, the view emerges from the shadows of the overpass into a wide open area bathed in golden light, passing palm trees and industrial buildings as the character walks toward the distant cityscape.
